name: Pumpkin Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8-inch square pan.
Use a mixer to cream the sugars and margarine until smooth.
Add egg replacer, pumpkin, water, corn syrup, and molasses; blend until smooth.
Pour batter into prepared pan.
Bake for about 30 minutes, or until it pulls away from the sides of the pan and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Do not overbake.
Let cake cool for at least 15 minutes before serving.
The cake is best when served hot. Sprinkle powdered sugar on top.
